payload.answer: The input indicates a read-only SQL policy for admin mode: SELECT queries are allowed, specifically exemplified by "SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10", while destructive operations like "DELETE FROM memory_cards" are denied.
citations: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed

entity_resolution.reason: No durable personal/user memory present; input describes a transient system access rule.

details: Parsed the statement as a policy/configuration explanation, not a memory update.
Preserved the distinction between allowed SELECT and denied DELETE operations.
Did not create durable memory cards from transient debug/configuration text.

repair_options: If deletion is needed, switch out of select-only mode or request elevated write permissions.
Use SELECT statements only while in this mode.
If the goal is verification, inspect rows with SELECT before attempting any write operation elsewhere.
